existing_features.title: In the Footer component, replace the third social media link's SVG icon (located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/footer[1]/div[3]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/a[3]/svg[1]) with the WhatsApp SVG logo, and update its href to https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb8BEFtFXUuarLwqVs0C. The link must open in a new tab with rel='noopener noreferrer'. The WhatsApp icon should match the same size and styling (hover effects, color) as the other social icons in the footer.

new_feature_requests.summary: Replace existing logo/icon with WhatsApp logo and add WhatsApp channel link: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb8BEFtFXUuarLwqVs0C

projectName: Replace footer social icon with WhatsApp logo and link
